notes: Advanced communication expansion around explanation and misunderstanding. This branch models klarstellen in the sense of making something clear, explicit, or no longer open to confusion.

de.definition: Etwas so erklaeren oder formulieren, dass kein Missverstaendnis mehr bleibt.
de.usage_note: Hier geht es um ausdrueckliches Klarwerdenlassen einer Aussage, Position oder Situation.
examples: Zu Beginn erklaert sie ihren Standpunkt noch einmal ganz deutlich.

it.definition: Spiegare o formulare qualcosa in modo tale da non lasciare più spazio a fraintendimenti.
it.usage_note: Qui nel senso di rendere esplicita una posizione, una frase o una situazione.
examples: All'inizio ripete il suo punto di vista in modo molto chiaro.

en.definition: To explain or formulate something so that no misunderstanding remains.
en.usage_note: This covers making a statement, position, or situation explicit and clear.
examples: At the start, she restates her position very clearly.

notes: Advanced communication expansion around clarity. This branch models eindeutig in the sense of being clear, unambiguous, and not open to different interpretations.

de.definition: So klar, dass nur eine Interpretation oder Schlussfolgerung moeglich ist.
de.usage_note: Typisch fuer Aussagen, Belege, Ergebnisse oder Signale.
examples: Die Zahlen zeigen in diesem Fall nur eine klare Richtung.

it.definition: Così chiaro da permettere una sola interpretazione o conclusione.
it.usage_note: Tipico per dichiarazioni, prove, risultati o segnali.
examples: In questo caso i numeri mostrano una sola direzione chiara.

en.definition: So clear that only one interpretation or conclusion is possible.
en.usage_note: Typical for statements, evidence, results, or signals.
examples: In this case, the figures point in only one clear direction.

notes: Advanced communication expansion around misunderstanding. This branch models missverständlich in the sense of being phrased or presented in a way that can easily be misunderstood.

de.definition: So formuliert oder dargestellt, dass man es leicht falsch verstehen kann.
de.usage_note: Typisch fuer Saetze, Nachrichten, Hinweise oder Reaktionen.
examples: Ohne den zweiten Satz klingt die Nachricht leicht in die falsche Richtung.

it.definition: Formulato o presentato in modo tale da poter essere facilmente capito male.
it.usage_note: Tipico per frasi, messaggi, avvisi o reazioni.
examples: Senza la seconda frase, il messaggio può suonare facilmente nel modo sbagliato.

en.definition: Phrased or presented in a way that can easily be understood wrongly.
en.usage_note: Typical for sentences, messages, notices, or reactions.
examples: Without the second sentence, the message can easily sound wrong.

notes: Advanced evaluation expansion around concept-b1-bewerten. This branch models einschätzen in the sense of judging or estimating something based on experience, information, or observation.

de.definition: Etwas auf Grundlage von Erfahrung, Informationen oder Beobachtung beurteilen oder abschaetzen.
de.usage_note: Hier geht es um ein urteilendes Einschaetzen, nicht um exaktes Messen.
examples: Noch vor dem Treffen versucht sie, die Lage realistisch zu bewerten.

it.definition: Giudicare o stimare qualcosa sulla base di esperienza, informazioni o osservazione.
it.usage_note: Qui nel senso di farsi una valutazione ragionata, non di misurare con precisione.
examples: Prima dell'incontro prova a farsi un'idea realistica della situazione.

en.definition: To judge or estimate something on the basis of experience, information, or observation.
en.usage_note: This covers reasoned assessment, not exact measurement.
examples: Before the meeting, she tries to form a realistic picture of the situation.

notes: Advanced evaluation expansion around concept-b1-bewerten and concept-b2-einschaetzen. This branch models Einschätzung as an assessment or considered judgment.

de.definition: Ein Urteil oder eine Beurteilung, die auf Erfahrung, Information oder Beobachtung beruht.
de.usage_note: Typisch fuer Lageeinschaetzungen, Risikoabschaetzungen oder persoenliche Beurteilungen.
examples: Ihre erste Bewertung der Lage erweist sich spaeter als ziemlich treffend.

it.definition: Un giudizio o una stima fondati su esperienza, informazioni o osservazione.
it.usage_note: Tipico per valutazioni della situazione, dei rischi o di un contesto.
examples: La sua prima idea della situazione si rivela poi abbastanza precisa.

en.definition: A judgment or estimate based on experience, information, or observation.
en.usage_note: Typical for situation assessments, risk assessments, or considered judgments.
examples: Her first reading of the situation later proves fairly accurate.

notes: Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-ueberzeugen. This branch models überzeugend in the sense of being persuasive because the reasoning, evidence, or presentation is strong.

de.definition: So stark begruendet oder praesentiert, dass es andere glaubhaft mitnimmt.
de.usage_note: Typisch fuer Argumente, Auftritte, Belege oder Konzepte.
examples: Ihr Vorschlag wirkt durch die klaren Zahlen besonders glaubhaft.

it.definition: Presentato o motivato in modo tale da risultare credibile e persuasivo.
it.usage_note: Tipico per argomenti, prove, presentazioni o proposte.
examples: La sua proposta appare particolarmente credibile grazie ai dati chiari.

en.definition: Presented or reasoned in a way that seems credible and persuasive.
en.usage_note: Typical for arguments, evidence, proposals, or presentations.
examples: Her proposal seems especially credible because the numbers are so clear.

notes: Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-verantwortung and concept-b1-verantwortlich. This branch models verantwortungsvoll in the sense of acting with care, seriousness, and awareness of consequences.

de.definition: So handelnd, dass Folgen ernst genommen werden und sorgfaeltig mit einer Aufgabe oder Rolle umgegangen wird.
de.usage_note: Hier geht es um die Art zu handeln, nicht nur darum, fuer etwas offiziell zustaendig zu sein.
examples: Mit vertraulichen Daten geht sie immer sehr umsichtig um.

it.definition: Che agisce tenendo seriamente conto delle conseguenze e trattando con cura un compito o un ruolo.
it.usage_note: Qui nel senso del modo di agire, non solo dell'essere formalmente incaricato.
examples: Con i dati riservati si comporta sempre con molta prudenza.

en.definition: Acting in a way that takes consequences seriously and treats a role or task with care.
en.usage_note: This covers responsible conduct, not only formal responsibility or being in charge.
examples: She always handles confidential data with great care.

notes: Advanced reliability expansion connected to high-performance and responsible-behavior language. This branch models zuverlässig in the sense of being dependable and consistently working or acting as expected.

de.definition: So, dass man sich darauf verlassen kann, weil es konstant gut funktioniert oder geschieht.
de.usage_note: Kann fuer Menschen, Informationen, Systeme oder Prozesse gelten.
examples: Auch unter Zeitdruck liefert das Team konstant gute Ergebnisse.

it.definition: Tale da potervi fare affidamento, perché funziona o agisce bene in modo costante.
it.usage_note: Può riferirsi a persone, informazioni, sistemi o processi.
examples: Anche sotto pressione, il team produce risultati buoni con continuità.

en.definition: Dependable because it works or acts well in a steady and consistent way.
en.usage_note: This can apply to people, information, systems, or processes.
examples: Even under pressure, the team keeps producing good results consistently.

notes: Advanced reasoning expansion around Zusammenhang and assessment language. This branch models einordnen in the sense of placing information, events, or statements into a broader context or category so that they can be understood properly.

de.definition: Etwas in einen groesseren Zusammenhang oder in eine passende Kategorie setzen, damit es besser verstanden werden kann.
de.usage_note: Hier vor allem fuer Informationen, Ereignisse, Aussagen oder Entwicklungen.
examples: Er versucht, die neuen Zahlen im groesseren Bild zu verstehen.

it.definition: Collocare qualcosa in un contesto più ampio o in una categoria adatta per capirlo meglio.
it.usage_note: Qui soprattutto per informazioni, eventi, affermazioni o sviluppi.
examples: Prova a leggere i nuovi numeri dentro un quadro più ampio.

en.definition: To place something in a broader context or suitable category so that it can be understood better.
en.usage_note: This is used especially for information, events, statements, or developments.
examples: He tries to read the new figures within a broader picture.

notes: Advanced reasoning expansion around Zusammenhang and context-setting language. This branch models Einordnung as the act or result of contextualizing or classifying something meaningfully.

de.definition: Die gedankliche Einbettung oder Kategorisierung von etwas, damit es besser verstanden werden kann.
de.usage_note: Typisch fuer Erklaerungen, Analysen oder Kommentare, die Fakten in einen Zusammenhang setzen.
examples: Sein kurzer Kommentar hilft allen, die Meldung besser zu verstehen.

it.definition: L'inserimento o la classificazione ragionata di qualcosa in un contesto più ampio per capirlo meglio.
it.usage_note: Tipico per spiegazioni, analisi o commenti che danno prospettiva ai fatti.
examples: Il suo breve commento aiuta tutti a capire meglio la notizia.

en.definition: The act or result of placing something in a broader context so that it can be understood better.
en.usage_note: Typical for explanations, analyses, or commentary that put facts into perspective.
examples: His short comment helps everyone understand the report better.
